text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship is finished training for the day.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, time for some suppletrain! The grind never
ends!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Are you serious? You don't know what suppletrain
is? What are you, stuck in the Stone Age? Geez.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Supple as in "supplementary." Train as in
"training." Duh.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
It's trending all over the Golshi multiverse, in case
you've been living under a rock!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna be my trainer, you gotta keep up
with what's going viral and catch it like the
common cold, yo!
choice_data_list: True, I can't fall behind the times.
True, I can't fall behind the times.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
If you're gonna be my trainer, you gotta keep up
with what's going viral and catch it like the
common cold, yo!
choice_data_list: True, I can't fall behind the times.
True, I can't fall behind the times.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I like your enthusiasm! With a mindset like that,
there's a spot for you in the Golshi multiverse yet!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And since you're so motivated to stay in the
know, I'll give you a crash course on all the
trends!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Come on! I'll show you what suppletrain is all
about!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"See dee"? Never heard of it. You sure that's a
thing?
choice_data_list: In the Trainer multiverse, it is.
In the Trainer multiverse, it is.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh. Well, what's it mean? Enlighten me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell Gold Ship that "CD" stands for "cool down,"
and she laughs.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of cooling down, though, there's gotta
be a more efficient way to do it.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Like eating shaved ice while cooling down! We
can call it "The Coolest Cool Down"!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it'll be all the rage in the Golshi multiverse!
I can just feel it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One can only hope it stays in the Golshi
multiverse...
